summary: Fans are grateful for the release of this first “Morning Dew” show after the coma, though they haven’t heard it yet.
review: The lone reviewer expresses enthusiastic thanks that an audio version finally exists for what is described as the first Morning Dew concert after the coma. No comments are made about the performance or recording quality because the reviewer has not listened to the tape.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one brief, positive review with a 4‑star rating and no substantive details on music or sound quality; rating reflects reviewer enthusiasm but limited information.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No technical comments; reviewer has not yet listened to the recording.
